longitude.description: Longitude in decimal degrees of the centroid of the zone

proptowngqdu.name: PropTownGQDU
proptowngqdu.description: Proportion of group quarters accommodations located within the town portion of the zone

urbanarea.name: UrbanArea
urbanarea.description: Area that is Urban and unprotected (i.e. developable) within the zone

townarea.name: TownArea
townarea.description: Area that is Town and unprotected (i.e. developable) within the zone

ruralarea.name: RuralArea
ruralarea.description: Area that is Rural and unprotected (i.e. developable) within the zone

d3bpo4.name: D3bpo4
d3bpo4.description: Intersection density in terms of pedestrian-oriented intersections having four or more legs per square mile (Ref: EPA 2010 Smart Location Database)

mixuseprop.name: MixUseProp
mixuseprop.description: Target for proportion of households located in mixed-use neighborhoods in zone (or NA if no target)

pkgspacespersfdu.name: PkgSpacesPerSFDU
pkgspacespersfdu.description: Average number of free parking spaces available to residents of single-family dwelling units

pkgspacespermfdu.name: PkgSpacesPerMFDU
pkgspacespermfdu.description: Average number of free parking spaces available to residents of multifamily dwelling units

pkgspacespergq.name: PkgSpacesPerGQ
pkgspacespergq.description: Average number of free parking spaces available to group quarters residents

propwkrpay.name: PropWkrPay
propwkrpay.description: Proportion of workers who pay for parking

propcashout.name: PropCashOut
propcashout.description: Proportions of workers paying for parking in a cash-out-buy-back program

propnonwrktrippay.name: PropNonWrkTripPay
propnonwrktrippay.description: Proportion of non-work trips who pay for parking

pkgcost.name: PkgCost
pkgcost.description: Average daily cost for long-term parking (e.g. paid on monthly basis)

ecoprop.name: EcoProp
ecoprop.description: Proportion of workers working in Bzone who participate in strong employee commute options program

impprop.name: ImpProp
impprop.description: Proportion of households residing in Bzone who participate in strong individualized marketing program

carsvclevel.name: CarSvcLevel
carsvclevel.description: Level of car service availability. High means access is competitive with household owned car. Low is not competitive.

carsvclevel.name: CarSvcLevel
carsvclevel.description: Level of car service availability. High means access is competitive with household owned car. Low is not competitive.

drrevmi.name: DRRevMi
drrevmi.description: Annual revenue-miles of demand-responsive public transit service

vprevmi.name: VPRevMi
vprevmi.description: Annual revenue-miles of van-pool and similar public transit service

mbrevmi.description: Annual revenue-miles of standard bus public transit service

rbrevmi.description: Annual revenue-miles of rapid-bus and commuter bus public transit service

mgrevmi.name: MGRevMi
mgrevmi.description: Annual revenue-miles of monorail and automated guideway public transit service

srrevmi.name: SRRevMi
srrevmi.description: Annual revenue-miles of streetcar and trolleybus public transit service

hrrevmi.name: HRRevMi
hrrevmi.description: Annual revenue-miles of light rail and heavy rail public transit service

crrevmi.name: CRRevMi
crrevmi.description: Annual revenue-miles of commuter rail, hybrid rail, cable car, and aerial tramway public transit service

d4c.name: D4c
d4c.description: Aggregate frequency of transit service within 0.25 miles of block group boundary per hour during evening peak period (Ref: EPA 2010 Smart Location Database)

fwylanemi.name: FwyLaneMi
fwylanemi.description: Lane-miles of roadways functionally classified as freeways or expressways in the urbanized portion of the metropolitan area

artlanemi.name: ArtLaneMi
artlanemi.description: Lane-miles of roadways functionally classified as arterials (but not freeways or expressways) in the urbanized portion of the metropolitan area

drvperprsn15to19.description: Target ratio of drivers to persons in the 15 to 19 years old age group

drvperprsn30to54.description: Target ratio of drivers to persons in the 30 to 54 years old age group

drvperprsn55to64.description: Target ratio of drivers to persons in the 55 to 64 years old age group

drvperprsn65plus.description: Target ratio of drivers to persons in the 65 or older age group

lowcarsvccost.name: LowCarSvcCost
lowcarsvccost.description: Average cost in dollars per mile for travel by low service level car service exclusive of the cost of fuel, road use taxes, and carbon taxes (and any other social costs charged to vehicle use).

avecarsvcvehicleage.name: AveCarSvcVehicleAge
avecarsvcvehicleage.description: Average age of car service vehicles in years

lttrkcarsvcsubprop.name: LtTrkCarSvcSubProp
lttrkcarsvcsubprop.description: The proportion of light-truck owners who would substitute a less-costly car service option for owning their light truck

autocarsvcsubprop.name: AutoCarSvcSubProp
autocarsvcsubprop.description: Th proportion of automobile owners who would substitute a less-costly car service option for owning their automobile

automeanage.name: AutoMeanAge
automeanage.description: Mean age of automobiles owned or leased by households.

lttrkmeanage.name: LtTrkMeanAge
lttrkmeanage.description: Mean age of light trucks owned or leased by households.

vehownflatratefee.name: VehOwnFlatRateFee
vehownflatratefee.description: Annual flat rate tax per vehicle in dollars

vehownadvaloremtax.name: VehOwnAdValoremTax
vehownadvaloremtax.description: Annual proportion of vehicle value paid in taxes

paydhhprop.description: Proportion of households in the Azone who have pay-as-you-drive insurance for their vehicles

propsovdvmtdiverted.name: PropSovDvmtDiverted
propsovdvmtdiverted.description: Goals for the proportion of household DVMT in single occupant vehicle tours with round-trip distances of 20 miles or less be diverted to bicycling or other slow speed modes of travel

electricityci.name: ElectricityCI
electricityci.description: Carbon intensity of electricity at point of consumption (grams CO2e per megajoule)

transitethanolpropgasoline.description: Ethanol proportion of gasoline used by transit vehicles

transitbiodieselpropdiesel.description: Biodiesel proportion of diesel used by transit vehicles

transitrngpropcng.name: TransitRngPropCng
transitrngpropcng.description: Renewable natural gas proportion of compressed natural gas used by transit vehicles

vanpropdiesel.description: Proportion of non-electric transit van travel powered by diesel

vanpropgasoline.description: Proportion of non-electric transit van travel powered by gasoline

buspropdiesel.description: Proportion of non-electric transit bus travel powered by diesel

buspropgasoline.name: BusPropGasoline
buspropgasoline.description: Proportion of non-electric transit bus travel powered by gasoline

buspropcng.name: BusPropCng
buspropcng.description: Proportion of non-electric transit bus travel powered by compressed natural gas

railpropdiesel.name: RailPropDiesel
railpropdiesel.description: Proportion of non-electric transit rail travel powered by diesel

railpropgasoline.name: RailPropGasoline
railpropgasoline.description: Proportion of non-electric transit rail travel powered by gasoline

vanpropicev.description: Proportion of transit van travel using internal combustion engine powertrains

vanpropbev.description: Proportion of transit van travel using battery electric powertrains

buspropicev.name: BusPropIcev
buspropicev.description: Proportion of transit bus travel using internal combustion engine powertrains

busprophev.name: BusPropHev
busprophev.description: Proportion of transit bus travel using hybrid electric powertrains

buspropbev.name: BusPropBev
buspropbev.description: Proportion of transit bus travel using battery electric powertrains

railpropicev.name: RailPropIcev
railpropicev.description: Proportion of transit rail travel using internal combustion engine powertrains

railprophev.name: RailPropHev
railprophev.description: Proportion of transit rail travel using hybrid electric powertrains

railpropev.name: RailPropEv
railpropev.description: Proportion of transit rail travel using electric powertrains

carsvcautopropicev.name: CarSvcAutoPropIcev
carsvcautopropicev.description: Proportion of car service automobile travel powered by internal combustion engine powertrains

carsvcautoprophev.name: CarSvcAutoPropHev
carsvcautoprophev.description: Proportion of car service automobile travel powered by hybrid electric powertrains

carsvcautopropbev.name: CarSvcAutoPropBev
carsvcautopropbev.description: Proportion of car service automobile travel powered by battery electric powertrains

carsvclttrkpropicev.name: CarSvcLtTrkPropIcev
carsvclttrkpropicev.description: Proportion of car service light truck travel powered by internal combustion engine powertrains

carsvclttrkprophev.name: CarSvcLtTrkPropHev
carsvclttrkprophev.description: Proportion of car service light truck travel powered by hybrid electric powertrains

carsvclttrkpropbev.name: CarSvcLtTrkPropBev
carsvclttrkpropbev.description: Proportion of car service light truck travel powered by battery electric powertrains

comsvcautopropicev.name: ComSvcAutoPropIcev
comsvcautopropicev.description: Proportion of commercial service automobile travel powered by internal combustion engine powertrains

comsvcautoprophev.name: ComSvcAutoPropHev
comsvcautoprophev.description: Proportion of commercial service automobile travel powered by hybrid electric powertrains

comsvcautopropbev.name: ComSvcAutoPropBev
comsvcautopropbev.description: Proportion of commercial service automobile travel powered by battery electric powertrains

comsvclttrkpropicev.name: ComSvcLtTrkPropIcev
comsvclttrkpropicev.description: Proportion of commercial service light truck travel powered by internal combustion engine powertrains

comsvclttrkprophev.name: ComSvcLtTrkPropHev
comsvclttrkprophev.description: Proportion of commercial service light truck travel powered by hybrid electric powertrains

comsvclttrkpropbev.name: ComSvcLtTrkPropBev
comsvclttrkpropbev.description: Proportion of commercial service light truck travel powered by battery electric powertrains

hvytrkpropicev.name: HvyTrkPropIcev
hvytrkpropicev.description: Proportion of heavy truck travel powered by internal combustion engine powertrains

hvytrkprophev.name: HvyTrkPropHev

hvytrkpropbev.name: HvyTrkPropBev
hvytrkpropbev.description: Proportion of heavy truck travel powered by battery electric powertrains

propsfchargingavail.name: PropSFChargingAvail
propsfchargingavail.description: Proportion of single-family dwellings in Azone that have PEV charging facilties installed or able to be installed

propmfchargingavail.name: PropMFChargingAvail
propmfchargingavail.description: Proportion of multi-family dwelling units in Azone that have PEV charging facilities available

propgqchargingavail.name: PropGQChargingAvail
propgqchargingavail.description: Proportion of group quarters dwelling units in Azone that have PEV charging facilities available

stateabbrlookup.name: StateAbbrLookup
stateabbrlookup.description: Postal code abbreviation of the 50 states, the District of Columbia (DC), or Puerto Rico (PR) where the region is located. It is recommended that the value be blank if the model is not a state model (i.e. is a model for a metropolitan area). See the module documentation for details.

hvytrkdvmtgrowthbasis.name: HvyTrkDvmtGrowthBasis
hvytrkdvmtgrowthbasis.description: Factor used to grow heavy truck DVMT from base year value

hvytrkdvmt.name: HvyTrkDvmt
hvytrkdvmt.description: Average daily vehicle miles of travel on roadways in the region by heavy trucks during the base year. The value for this input may be NA instead of number. In that case, if a state abbreviation is provided, the base year value is calculated from the state per capita rate tabulated by the LoadDefaultRoadDvmtValues.R script and the base year population. If the state abbreviation is NA (as for a metropolitan model) the base year value is calculated from metropolitan area per capita rates and metropolitan area population.

comsvcdvmtgrowthbasis.name: ComSvcDvmtGrowthBasis
comsvcdvmtgrowthbasis.description: Factor used to grow commercial service vehicle DVMT in Marea from base year value

uzanamelookup.name: UzaNameLookup
uzanamelookup.description: Name(s) of urbanized area(s) in default tables corresponding to the Marea(s). This may be omitted if values are provided for both UrbanLdvDvmt and UrbanHvyTrkDvmt. The name(s) must be consistent with names in the urbanized area names in the default data. See module documentation for a listing.

urbanldvdvmt.name: UrbanLdvDvmt
urbanldvdvmt.description: Average daily vehicle miles of travel on roadways in the urbanized portion of the Marea by light-duty vehicles during the base year. This value may be omitted if a value for UzaNameLookup is provided so that a value may be computed from the urbanized area per capita rate tabulated by the LoadDefaultRoadDvmtValues.R script and the base year urban population.

urbanhvytrkdvmt.name: UrbanHvyTrkDvmt
urbanhvytrkdvmt.description: Average daily vehicle miles of travel on roadways in the urbanized portion of the Marea by heavy trucks during he base year. This value may be omitted if a value for UzaNameLookup is provided so that a value may be computed from the urbanized area per capita rate tabulated by the LoadDefaultRoadDvmtValues.R script and the base year urban population.

ldvfwydvmtprop.name: LdvFwyDvmtProp
ldvfwydvmtprop.description: Proportion of light-duty daily vehicle miles of travel in the urbanized portion of the Marea occurring on freeways

ldvartdvmtprop.name: LdvArtDvmtProp
ldvartdvmtprop.description: Proportion of light-duty daily vehicle miles of travel in the urbanized portion of the Marea occurring on arterial roadways

ldvothdvmtprop.name: LdvOthDvmtProp
ldvothdvmtprop.description: Proportion of light-duty daily vehicle miles of travel in the urbanized portion of the Marea occurring on other roadways

hvytrkfwydvmtprop.name: HvyTrkFwyDvmtProp
hvytrkfwydvmtprop.description: Proportion of heavy truck daily vehicle miles of travel in the urbanized portion of the Marea occurring on freeways

hvytrkartdvmtprop.name: HvyTrkArtDvmtProp
hvytrkartdvmtprop.description: Proportion of heavy truck daily vehicle miles of travel in the urbanized portion of the Marea occurring on arterial roadways

hvytrkothdvmtprop.name: HvyTrkOthDvmtProp
hvytrkothdvmtprop.description: Proportion of heavy truck daily vehicle miles of travel in the urbanized portion of the Marea occurring on other roadways

busfwydvmtprop.name: BusFwyDvmtProp
busfwydvmtprop.description: Proportion of bus daily vehicle miles of travel in the urbanized portion of the Marea occurring on freeways

busartdvmtprop.name: BusArtDvmtProp
busartdvmtprop.description: Proportion of bus daily vehicle miles of travel in the urbanized portion of the Marea occurring on arterial roadways

busothdvmtprop.name: BusOthDvmtProp
busothdvmtprop.description: Proportion of bus daily vehicle miles of travel in the urbanized portion of the Marea occuring on other roadways

level.name: Level
level.description: Congestion levels: None = none, Mod = moderate, Hvy = heavy, Sev = severe, Ext = extreme

art_rcr.name: Art_Rcr
art_rcr.description: Percentage reduction of recurring arterial delay that would occur with full deployment of other user-defined arterial operations measures

art_nonrcr.name: Art_NonRcr
art_nonrcr.description: Percentage reduction of non-recurring arterial delay that would occur with full deployment of other user-defined arterial operations measures

fwy_rcr.name: Fwy_Rcr
fwy_rcr.description: Percentage reduction of recurring freeway delay that would occur with full deployment of other user-defined freeway operations measures

fwy_nonrcr.name: Fwy_NonRcr
fwy_nonrcr.description: Percentage reduction of non-recurring freeway delay that would occur with full deployment of other user-defined freeway operations measures

rampmeterdeployprop.name: RampMeterDeployProp
rampmeterdeployprop.description: Proportion of freeway DVMT affected by ramp metering deployment

incidentmgtdeployprop.name: IncidentMgtDeployProp
incidentmgtdeployprop.description: Proportion of freeway DVMT affected by incident management deployment

signalcoorddeployprop.name: SignalCoordDeployProp
signalcoorddeployprop.description: Proportion of arterial DVMT affected by signal coordination deployment

accessmgtdeployprop.name: AccessMgtDeployProp
accessmgtdeployprop.description: Proportion of arterial DVMT affected by access management deployment

otherfwyopsdeployprop.name: OtherFwyOpsDeployProp
otherfwyopsdeployprop.description: Proportion of freeway DVMT affected by deployment of other user-defined freeway operations measures

otherartopsdeployprop.name: OtherArtOpsDeployProp
otherartopsdeployprop.description: Proportion of arterial DVMT affected by deployment of other user-defined arterial operations measures

fwynonecongchg.name: FwyNoneCongChg
fwynonecongchg.description: Charge per mile (U.S. dollars) of vehicle travel on freeways during periods of no congestion

fwymodcongchg.name: FwyModCongChg
fwymodcongchg.description: Charge per mile (U.S. dollars) of vehicle travel on freeways during periods of moderate congestion

fwyhvycongchg.name: FwyHvyCongChg
fwyhvycongchg.description: Charge per mile (U.S. dollars) of vehicle travel on freeways during periods of heavy congestion

fwysevcongchg.name: FwySevCongChg
fwysevcongchg.description: Charge per mile (U.S. dollars) of vehicle travel on freeways during periods of severe congestion

fwyextcongchg.name: FwyExtCongChg
fwyextcongchg.description: Charge per mile (U.S. dollars) of vehicle travel on freeways during periods of extreme congestion

artnonecongchg.name: ArtNoneCongChg
artnonecongchg.description: Charge per mile (U.S. dollars) of vehicle travel on arterials during periods of no congestion

artmodcongchg.name: ArtModCongChg
artmodcongchg.description: Charge per mile (U.S. dollars) of vehicle travel on arterials during periods of moderate congestion

arthvycongchg.name: ArtHvyCongChg
arthvycongchg.description: Charge per mile (U.S. dollars) of vehicle travel on arterials during periods of heavy congestion

artsevcongchg.name: ArtSevCongChg
artsevcongchg.description: Charge per mile (U.S. dollars) of vehicle travel on arterials during periods of severe congestion

artextcongchg.name: ArtExtCongChg
artextcongchg.description: Charge per mile (U.S. dollars) of vehicle travel on arterials during periods of extreme congestion

fwysmooth.name: FwySmooth
fwysmooth.description: Fractional deployment of speed smoothing traffic management on freeways, where 0 is no deployment and 1 is the full potential fuel savings

artsmooth.name: ArtSmooth
artsmooth.description: Fractional deployment of speed smoothing traffic management on arterials, where 0 is no deployment and 1 is the full potential fuel savings

ldvecodrive.name: LdvEcoDrive
ldvecodrive.description: Eco-driving penetration for light-duty vehicles; the fraction of vehicles from 0 to 1

hvytrkecodrive.name: HvyTrkEcoDrive
hvytrkecodrive.description: Eco-driving penetration for heavy-duty vehicles; the fraction of vehicles from 0 to 1

ownedvehaccesstime.name: OwnedVehAccessTime
ownedvehaccesstime.description: Average amount of time in minutes required for access to and egress from a household-owned vehicle for a trip

highcarsvcaccesstime.name: HighCarSvcAccessTime
highcarsvcaccesstime.description: Average amount of time in minutes required for access to and egress from a high service level car service for a trip

lowcarsvcaccesstime.name: LowCarSvcAccessTime
lowcarsvcaccesstime.description: Average amount of time in minutes required for access to and egress from a low service level car service for a trip

fuelcost.name: FuelCost
fuelcost.description: Retail cost of fuel per gas gallon equivalent in dollars

powercost.name: PowerCost
powercost.description: Retail cost of electric power per kilowatt-hour in dollars

fueltax.name: FuelTax
fueltax.description: Tax per gas gallon equivalent of fuel in dollars

vmttax.name: VmtTax
vmttax.description: Tax per mile of vehicle travel in dollars

pevsurchgtaxprop.name: PevSurchgTaxProp
pevsurchgtaxprop.description: Proportion of equivalent gas tax per mile paid by hydrocarbon fuel consuming vehicles to be charged to plug-in electric vehicles per mile of travel powered by electricity

propclimatecostpaid.name: PropClimateCostPaid
propclimatecostpaid.description: Proportion of climate change costs paid by users (i.e. ratio of carbon taxes to climate change costs)

propotherextcostpaid.name: PropOtherExtCostPaid
propotherextcostpaid.description: Proportion of other social costs paid by users

roadbasemodcost.name: RoadBaseModCost
roadbasemodcost.description: Average base modernization cost per light-duty vehicle mile traveled (dollars per vehicle mile). Base modernization includes roadway improvements exclusive of addition of lanes.

roadpresopmaintcost.name: RoadPresOpMaintCost
roadpresopmaintcost.description: Average road preservation, operations, and maintenance cost per light-duty vehicle mile traveled (dollars per vehicle mile).

roadothercost.name: RoadOtherCost
roadothercost.description: Average other road cost (e.g. administration, planning, project development, safety) per light-duty vehicle mile traveled (dollars per vehicle mile).

fwylnmicost.name: FwyLnMiCost
fwylnmicost.description: Average cost to build one freeway lane-mile (dollars per lane-mile)

artlnmicost.name: ArtLnMiCost
artlnmicost.description: Average cost to build one arterial lane-mile (dollars per lane-mile)

hvytrkpce.name: HvyTrkPCE
hvytrkpce.description: Passenger car equivalent (PCE) for heavy trucks. PCE indicates the number of light-duty vehicles a heavy truck is equivalent to in calculating road capacity.

comsvclttrkprop.name: ComSvcLtTrkProp
comsvclttrkprop.description: Regional proportion of commercial service vehicles that are light trucks

avecomsvcvehicleage.name: AveComSvcVehicleAge
avecomsvcvehicleage.description: Average age of commercial service vehicles

numhh.name: NumHh
numhh.description: Number of households (non-group and group quarters) residing in zone

numgq.name: NumGq
numgq.description: Number of people in non-institutional group quarters

hhtype.name: HhType
hhtype.description: Coded household age composition (e.g. 2-1-0-2-0-0) or Grp for group quarters

wkr15to19.name: Wkr15to19
wkr15to19.description: Workers in 15 to 19 year old age group

wkr20to29.name: Wkr20to29
wkr20to29.description: Workers in 20 to 29 year old age group

wkr30to54.name: Wkr30to54
wkr30to54.description: Workers in 30 to 54 year old age group

wkr55to64.name: Wkr55to64
wkr55to64.description: Workers in 55 to 64 year old age group

wkr65plus.name: Wkr65Plus
wkr65plus.description: Workers in 65 or older age group

numwkr.name: NumWkr
numwkr.description: Number of workers residing in the zone

numwkr.name: NumWkr
numwkr.description: Number of workers residing in zone

lifecycle.name: LifeCycle
lifecycle.description: Household life cycle as defined by 2009 NHTS LIF_CYC variable

income.name: Income
income.description: Total annual household (non-qroup & group quarters) income

housetype.name: HouseType
housetype.description: Type of dwelling unit in which the household resides (SF = single family, MF = multi-family, GQ = group quarters

sf.name: SF
sf.description: Number of households living in single family dwelling units in zone

mf.name: MF
mf.description: Number of households living in multi-family dwelling units in zone

gq.name: GQ
gq.description: Number of persons living in group quarters in zone

distancetowork.name: DistanceToWork
distancetowork.description: Distance from home to work assuming location at Bzone centroid and 'Manhattan' distance

loctype.name: LocType
loctype.description: Location type (Urban, Town, Rural) of the place where the household resides

urbanpop.name: UrbanPop
urbanpop.description: Urbanized area population in the Bzone

urbanpop.name: UrbanPop
urbanpop.description: Urbanized area population in the Marea

townpop.name: TownPop
townpop.description: Town (i.e. urban but non-urbanized area) population in the Bzone

townpop.name: TownPop
townpop.description: Town (i.e. urban but non-urbanized area) in the Marea

ruralpop.name: RuralPop
ruralpop.description: Rural (i.e. not urbanized and not town) population in the Bzone

ruralpop.name: RuralPop
ruralpop.description: Rural (i.e. not urbanized and not town) population in the Marea

urbanincome.name: UrbanIncome
urbanincome.description: Total household income of the urbanized area population in the Marea

townincome.name: TownIncome
townincome.description: Total household income of the town (i.e. urban but non-urbanized area) population in the Marea

ruralincome.name: RuralIncome
ruralincome.description: Total household income of the rural (i.e. not urbanized and not town) population in the Marea

d1b.name: D1B
d1b.description: Gross population density (people/acre) on unprotected (i.e. developable) land in zone (Ref: EPA 2010 Smart Location Database)

d1c.name: D1C
d1c.description: Gross employment density (jobs/acre) on unprotected land (i.e. developable) land in zone (Ref: EPA 2010 Smart Location Database)

d1d.name: D1D
d1d.description: Gross activity density (employment + households) on unprotected land in zone (Ref: EPA 2010 Smart Location Database)

d2a_jphh.name: D2A_JPHH
d2a_jphh.description: Ratio of jobs to households in zone (Ref: EPA 2010 Smart Location Database)

d2a_wrkemp.name: D2A_WRKEMP
d2a_wrkemp.description: Ratio of workers to jobs in zone (Ref: EPA 2010 Smart Location Database)

d2a_ephhm.name: D2A_EPHHM
d2a_ephhm.description: Employment and household entropy measure for zone considering numbers of households, retail jobs, service jobs, and other jobs (Ref: EPA 2010 Smart Location Database)

d5.name: D5
d5.description: Destination accessibility of zone calculated as harmonic mean of jobs within 2 miles and population within 5 miles

isurbanmixnbrhd.name: IsUrbanMixNbrhd
isurbanmixnbrhd.description: Flag identifying whether household is (1) or is not (0) in urban mixed-use neighborhood

freeparkingspaces.name: FreeParkingSpaces
freeparkingspaces.description: Number of free parking spaces available to the household

parkingunitcost.name: ParkingUnitCost
parkingunitcost.description: Daily cost for long-term parking (e.g. paid on monthly basis)

otherparkingcost.name: OtherParkingCost
otherparkingcost.description: Daily cost for parking at shopping locations or other locations of paid parking not including work (not adjusted for number of vehicle trips)

paysforparking.name: PaysForParking
paysforparking.description: Does worker pay for parking: 1 = yes, 0 = no

iscashout.name: IsCashOut
iscashout.description: Is worker paid parking in cash-out-buy-back program: 1 = yes, 0 = no

parkingcost.name: ParkingCost
parkingcost.description: Daily cost for long-term parking (e.g. paid on monthly basis)

isimp.name: IsIMP
isimp.description: Identifies whether household is participant in travel demand management individualized marketing program (IMP): 1 = yes, 0 = no

proptdmdvmtreduction.name: PropTdmDvmtReduction
proptdmdvmtreduction.description: Proportional reduction in household DVMT due to participation in travel demand management programs

iseco.name: IsECO
iseco.description: Identifies whether worker is a participant in travel demand management employee commute options program: 1 = yes, 0 = no

tranrevmipc.name: TranRevMiPC
tranrevmipc.description: Ratio of annual bus-equivalent revenue-miles (i.e. revenue-miles at the same productivity - passenger miles per revenue mile - as standard bus) to urbanized area population

vandvmt.name: VanDvmt
vandvmt.description: Total daily miles traveled by vans of various sizes to provide demand responsive, vanpool, and similar services.

busdvmt.name: BusDvmt
busdvmt.description: Total daily miles traveled by buses of various sizes to provide bus service of various types.

raildvmt.name: RailDvmt
raildvmt.description: Total daily miles traveled by light rail, heavy rail, commuter rail, and similar types of vehicles.

fwylanemipc.name: FwyLaneMiPC
fwylanemipc.description: Ratio of urbanized area freeway and expressway lane-miles to urbanized area population

drv15to19.name: Drv15to19
drv15to19.description: Number of drivers 15 to 19 years old

drv20to29.name: Drv20to29
drv20to29.description: Number of drivers 20 to 29 years old

drv30to54.name: Drv30to54
drv30to54.description: Number of drivers 30 to 54 years old

drv55to64.name: Drv55to64
drv55to64.description: Number of drivers 55 to 64 years old

drvagepersons.name: DrvAgePersons
drvagepersons.description: Number of people 15 year old or older in the household

vehicles.name: Vehicles
vehicles.description: Number of automobiles and light trucks owned or leased by the household including high level car service vehicles available to driving-age persons

numlttrk.name: NumLtTrk
numlttrk.description: Number of light trucks (pickup, sport-utility vehicle, and van) owned or leased by household

numauto.name: NumAuto
numauto.description: Number of automobiles (i.e. 4-tire passenger vehicles that are not light trucks) owned or leased by household

vehicleaccess.name: VehicleAccess
vehicleaccess.description: Identifier whether vehicle is owned by household (Own), if vehicle is low level car service (LowCarSvc), or if vehicle is high level car service (HighCarSvc)

type.name: Type
type.description: Vehicle body type: Auto = automobile, LtTrk = light trucks (i.e. pickup, SUV, Van)

owncost.name: OwnCost
owncost.description: Annual cost of vehicle ownership including depreciation, financing, insurance, taxes, and residential parking in dollars

owncost.name: OwnCost
owncost.description: Annual household vehicle ownership cost (depreciation, finance, insurance, taxes) savings in dollars

owncostpermile.name: OwnCostPerMile
owncostpermile.description: Annual cost of vehicle ownership per mile of vehicle travel (dollars per mile)

inscost.name: InsCost
inscost.description: Annual vehicle insurance cost in dollars

haspaydins.name: HasPaydIns
haspaydins.description: Identifies whether household has pay-as-you-drive insurance for vehicles: 1 = Yes, 0 = no

switchtocarsvc.name: SwitchToCarSvc
switchtocarsvc.description: Identifies whether a vehicle was switched from owned to car service

owncostsavings.name: OwnCostSavings
owncostsavings.description: Annual vehicle ownership cost (depreciation, finance, insurance, taxes) savings in dollars resulting from substituting the use of car services for a household vehicle

numhighcarsvc.name: NumHighCarSvc
numhighcarsvc.description: Number of high level service car service vehicles available to the household (difference between number of vehicles owned by the household and number of driving age persons for households having availability of high level car services

dvmt.name: Dvmt
dvmt.description: Average daily vehicle miles traveled by the household in autos or light trucks

urbanhhdvmt.description: Average daily vehicle miles traveled in autos or light trucks by households residing in the urbanized portion of the Marea

townhhdvmt.name: TownHhDvmt

ruralhhdvmt.name: RuralHhDvmt

walktrips.name: WalkTrips

biketrips.name: BikeTrips
biketrips.description: Average number of bicycle trips per year by household members

transittrips.name: TransitTrips
transittrips.description: Average number of public transit trips per year by household members
